blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,801 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 25°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect powder.
Saturday: 8" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 14".
